flows.name: remix-server-setup-flow
flows.description: Server-side entry point and request routing configuration for the Remix application.

flows.name: render-audit-log-pdf
flows.description: Renders a printable HTML page of a document's full audit log for PDF generation, fetched via an encrypted document ID.

flows.name: render-signing-certificate-pdf
flows.description: Renders a printable HTML signing certificate page — including recipient details, audit events, and a QR code — for PDF generation, fetched via an encrypted document ID.

flows.name: view-signed-document-share-page
flows.description: A visitor opens a public share link to view a signed document certificate or QR code confirmation page.

flows.name: render-opengraph-share-image
flows.description: A social media crawler or browser fetches a dynamically generated OpenGraph preview image for a signed document share link.

flows.name: share-link-flow
flows.description: Create or retrieve shareable links for documents and templates.

flows.name: docs-og-metadata-flow
flows.description: Generate OpenGraph metadata and serve documentation pages for social sharing and SEO.

features.name: envelope-management
features.description: End-to-end envelope lifecycle from creation and field placement through signing and completion, spanning core logic, tRPC API, and UI editor. (merged: lib/envelope-management, trpc/envelope, remix/envelope-editor)

flows.name: sign-envelope-as-recipient
flows.description: A recipient opens a signing link by token, fills fields, and submits their signature to complete their portion of the envelope.

flows.name: sign-envelope-via-direct-template-link
flows.display_name: Sign Envelope Via Direct Template Link
flows.description: A user opens a direct template link by token and signs the envelope generated from that template.

flows.name: create-envelope
flows.description: An authenticated user creates a new envelope by uploading documents and configuring settings.

flows.name: distribute-envelope
flows.description: An owner sends a prepared envelope to recipients to begin the signing workflow.

flows.name: edit-envelope-fields-and-recipients
flows.description: User configures recipients and fields on an envelope document through the autosaving editor context.

flows.name: download-envelope-item-pdf
flows.description: A user or recipient downloads the PDF file for a specific envelope item, with optional token-based access.

flows.name: duplicate-or-save-envelope-as-template
flows.display_name: Duplicate or Save Envelope as Template
flows.description: An owner duplicates an existing envelope or saves it as a reusable template.

flows.name: delete-or-bulk-manage-envelopes
flows.description: An owner deletes individual envelopes or performs bulk delete and move operations across multiple envelopes.

flows.name: edit-envelope-fields-and-recipients
flows.description: User configures recipients and fields on an envelope document through the autosaving editor context.

flows.name: download-signed-document
flows.description: User downloads the signed or original PDF version of a completed envelope document.

flows.name: embed-create-or-update-document
flows.description: Embedded partner creates or updates a document within an embedded authoring session.

flows.name: embed-multi-sign-document
flows.description: Embedded user retrieves and applies signatures to a multi-signer document within an embedded signing session.

flows.name: embed-sign-document
flows.description: Recipient opens an embedded signing session to review and sign a document via token.

flows.name: embed-author-document
flows.description: Embedded user uploads a PDF, configures recipients and places fields to create a new document.

flows.name: embed-multisign-documents
flows.description: Embedded recipient signs multiple documents in a single session using multiple tokens.

flows.name: embed-author-envelope
flows.description: Embedded user creates a new envelope via the v2 authoring flow.

flows.name: upload-document
flows.description: User drops or selects a PDF file to initiate document creation.

flows.name: configure-document-settings
flows.description: User configures document-level settings such as visibility, authentication, signature types, and date/timezone formats.

flows.name: add-document-signers
flows.description: User adds, reorders, and configures recipients and their signing roles for a document.

flows.name: place-document-fields
flows.description: User drags and places signature, date, text, and other field types onto document pages for each recipient.

flows.name: compose-document-email
flows.description: User writes the email subject and message sent to recipients when the document is dispatched for signing.

flows.name: browse-team-documents
flows.description: User browses, searches, and filters all documents within a team workspace.

flows.name: view-document-details
flows.description: User views the read-only detail page for a specific document including recipients and recent activity.

flows.name: edit-document
flows.description: User opens the envelope editor to configure fields and recipients for a draft document.

flows.name: envelope-expiration-flow
flows.description: Envelope expiration duration calculation and configuration.

flows.name: envelope-permissions-flow
flows.description: Envelope item permission resolution and access control.

flows.name: envelope-download-flow
flows.description: Envelope and document download URL generation for PDF retrieval and viewing.

flows.name: envelope-field-management-flow
flows.description: Create, update, and delete signature fields across envelopes and templates.

flows.name: envelope-retrieval-flow
flows.description: Fetch envelope data by ID with access control and field information for signing.

flows.name: envelope-update-flow
flows.description: Modify envelope metadata and attachment content during editing.

flows.name: manage-folders-flow
flows.description: Create, read, update, and delete document folders with breadcrumb navigation.

flows.name: manage-envelope-recipients-flow
flows.description: Create, delete, and track envelope recipients with signing turn validation.

flows.name: manage-envelopes-flow
flows.description: Complete envelope lifecycle including creation, field/recipient configuration, updates, and deletion.

flows.name: manage-envelope-items-flow
flows.description: Create, update, and delete envelope document items and attachments.

flows.name: retrieve-envelopes-flow
flows.description: Fetch envelope data for editing, viewing, and batch retrieval by ID or token.

flows.name: envelope-file-retrieval
flows.description: Server-side handler for retrieving files associated with envelope items.

flows.name: manage-envelope-attachments-flow
flows.description: Create, update, and delete document attachments within envelopes.

flows.name: manage-envelope-fields-flow
flows.description: Create, read, update, and delete signature and form fields within envelopes.

flows.name: generate-audit-certificates-flow
flows.description: Generate PDF exports of audit logs and signing certificates.

flows.name: recipient-management-flow
flows.description: Recipient lookup, signature history, suggestions, and assignment across documents, templates, and envelopes.

flows.name: field-signing-handlers
flows.description: Client-side field interaction handlers for various document field types during signing.

flows.name: manage-api-tokens-flow
flows.description: Create, list, delete, and validate API tokens for developer integrations.

flows.name: manage-webhooks-flow
flows.description: Webhook lifecycle management including creation, deletion, retrieval, and event trigger configuration.

flows.name: zapier-webhook-integration
flows.description: Zapier webhook handlers for document listing, subscription, and unsubscription.

flows.name: manage-profile-avatars-flow
flows.description: Upload, retrieve, and display user profile avatar images.

flows.name: manage-user-flow
flows.description: User account lifecycle including creation, deletion, profile updates, and password management.

flows.name: user-lookup-flow
flows.description: Retrieve user records by various identifiers including email, ID, and reset tokens.

flows.name: password-reset-flow
flows.description: Password reset token validation and recovery token management.

flows.name: field-completion-flow
flows.description: Retrieve field data and completion status for signing recipients.

flows.name: user-analytics-flow
flows.description: Track user engagement metrics including monthly document completions, signer conversions, and growth analytics.

flows.name: admin-analytics-insights
flows.description: Admin dashboard analytics including document stats, recipient stats, signing volume, and organisation growth metrics.

flows.name: admin-user-recipient-updates
flows.description: Admin operations to update user and recipient records.

features.name: document-signing
features.description: Document field validation, signing authentication controls, and document management tRPC routes. (merged: lib/document-signing, lib/document-auth, trpc/document)

flows.name: create-document
flows.description: User uploads a PDF and creates a new document envelope with recipients, fields, and metadata.

flows.name: distribute-document
flows.description: User sends a prepared document to all recipients for signing.

flows.name: sign-document-with-token
flows.description: Recipient opens a document via token link, fills fields, and completes signing.

flows.name: reject-document
flows.description: Recipient rejects a document they were asked to sign using their recipient token.

flows.name: download-signed-document
flows.description: User downloads the completed signed document or its audit certificate.

flows.name: share-document
flows.description: User or recipient generates a shareable link for a signed document.

flows.name: delete-document
flows.description: User permanently deletes a document they own.

flows.name: duplicate-document
flows.description: User duplicates an existing document to create a new editable copy.

flows.name: draw-or-upload-signature
flows.description: User draws, types, or uploads an image as their signature via the signature pad.

flows.name: sign-document
flows.description: Recipient opens a document via token link, authenticates if required, fills fields, and submits their signature.

flows.name: view-signing-complete
flows.description: Recipient lands on the completion confirmation page after successfully signing a document, with options to download or claim an account.

flows.name: view-signing-waiting
flows.description: Recipient is shown a waiting screen when it is not yet their turn to sign due to sequential signing order.

flows.name: view-document-rejected
flows.description: Recipient views the rejection confirmation page after a document has been declined.

flows.name: view-document-expired
flows.description: Recipient is shown an expiry notice page when their signing link has passed its deadline.

flows.name: document-audit-logging-flow
flows.description: Document audit log data creation and event tracking.

flows.name: document-auth-flow
flows.description: Document and recipient authentication options configuration.

flows.name: recipient-field-validation-flow
flows.description: Recipient field completion and validation status detection.

flows.name: document-access-flow
flows.description: Retrieve documents by access tokens and signing tokens for recipient authentication.

flows.name: document-audit-flow
flows.description: Retrieve certificate audit logs and signing statistics for compliance and reporting.

flows.name: document-management-flow
flows.description: Document CRUD operations, retrieval, and inbox management.

flows.name: attachment-management
flows.description: tRPC routes for document and envelope attachment lifecycle operations.

flows.name: field-rendering-flow
flows.description: Document field UI rendering including grid snapping, hover interactions, and visual feedback.

flows.name: passkey-authentication-setup
flows.description: WebAuthn passkey registration and authentication challenge generation.

flows.name: passkey-management-flow
flows.description: Create, update, delete, and authenticate with passkeys for WebAuthn-based signing.

flows.name: manage-file-uploads-flow
flows.description: File storage lifecycle including upload presigning, retrieval, updates, and deletion.

features.name: organisation-management
features.description: Organisation lifecycle management including creation, member management, branding, and settings across core lib, tRPC API, and Remix UI. (merged: lib/organisation-management, trpc/organisation, remix/organization-settings)

flows.name: create-organisation
flows.description: User creates a new organisation from the personal settings organisations page.

flows.name: configure-organisation-general-settings
flows.description: Admin updates organisation name, avatar, and can delete the organisation.

flows.name: invite-and-manage-organisation-members
flows.description: Admin invites, views, searches, and manages members and pending invites for an organisation.

flows.name: manage-organisation-groups
flows.description: Admin creates, edits, and deletes custom member groups within an organisation.

flows.name: accept-or-decline-organisation-invitation
flows.description: User accepts or declines a pending organisation membership invitation from their personal settings.

flows.name: link-organisation-account-via-email
flows.description: System sends a confirmation email to a user to approve linking their account to an organisation.

flows.name: accept-organisation-invitation
flows.description: User accepts or declines an organisation membership invitation via a token link.

flows.name: view-organisation-dashboard
flows.description: User views the organisation landing page listing teams and member actions.

flows.name: organisation-role-hierarchy-flow
flows.description: Highest organisation role determination within user groups.

flows.name: manage-organisation-members-flow
flows.description: Create organisations and manage member invitations with claim tracking.

flows.name: manage-organisation-groups-flow
flows.description: Create and delete organisation member groups for team management.

flows.name: manage-organisation-flow
flows.description: Create organisations and manage member invitations.

flows.name: view-organisation-session-flow
flows.description: Retrieve current organisation session context for authenticated users.

flows.name: manage-admin-organisations
flows.description: Admin finds, creates, updates, and swaps subscriptions for organisations.

flows.name: manage-organisation-members
flows.description: Admin promotes a member to owner or updates their role within an organisation.

flows.name: manage-subscription-claims
flows.description: Admin creates, updates, deletes, and lists subscription claims controlling plan entitlements.

flows.name: manage-users
flows.description: Admin views, updates, deletes, enables, disables, resets 2FA, and inspects teams for a user.

flows.name: manage-documents
flows.description: Admin searches, deletes, reseals, inspects jobs, and downloads audit logs for documents.

flows.name: manage-email-domains
flows.description: Admin lists, retrieves, and re-registers organisation email domains.

flows.name: configure-site-settings
flows.description: Admin updates global site settings such as feature flags or platform configuration.

flows.name: provision-stripe-billing
flows.description: Admin creates a Stripe customer and resyncs the licence for an organisation.

flows.name: administrate-platform
flows.description: Admin user manages platform-wide resources including users, organisations, documents, and stats.

flows.name: admin-organisation-management-flow
flows.description: Admin retrieval and updates of organisation data and settings.

flows.name: admin-team-management-flow
flows.description: Admin retrieval and management of team data.

flows.name: admin-user-management-flow
flows.description: Admin retrieval and updates of user and recipient data.

flows.name: create-api-token
flows.description: Authenticated user creates a new API token with an optional expiration date for personal or team use.

flows.name: list-api-tokens
flows.description: Authenticated user retrieves all existing API tokens for their account or team.

flows.name: delete-api-token
flows.description: Authenticated user deletes a specific API token by ID for their account or team.

flows.name: create-webhook
flows.description: User creates a new webhook with a URL, event triggers, and optional secret for a team.

flows.name: edit-webhook
flows.description: User updates an existing webhook's URL, event triggers, enabled state, or secret.

flows.name: delete-webhook
flows.description: User permanently removes a webhook by ID from their team.

flows.name: trigger-test-webhook
flows.description: User sends a test event to a configured webhook endpoint to verify it is working.

flows.name: browse-webhook-calls
flows.description: User lists and filters historical webhook delivery call records for a specific webhook.

flows.name: resend-webhook-call
flows.description: User retries a previously failed or completed webhook call by re-dispatching its payload.

features.name: auth
features.description: Authentication flows covering UI routes, server-side auth configuration, and passkey/WebAuthn tRPC procedures. (merged: apps/remix/auth, packages/auth, packages-2/trpc/auth)

flows.name: sign-in
flows.description: User signs in with email/password, SSO, or passkey.

flows.name: sign-up
flows.description: User registers a new account with email/password or SSO.

flows.name: reset-password
flows.description: User requests a password reset email and sets a new password via a token link.

flows.name: verify-email
flows.description: User verifies their email address by clicking a token link sent to their inbox.

flows.name: sign-in-organisation-sso
flows.description: User signs in through an organisation-specific SSO portal and confirms the SSO connection.

flows.name: manage-passkeys
flows.description: User registers, lists, updates, or deletes passkeys for passwordless authentication.

flows.name: refresh-session-on-focus
flows.description: User's authentication session is automatically refreshed when they return to the browser window.

flows.name: auth-configuration-flow
flows.description: Authentication configuration including cookie domain and signup domain allowlisting.

flows.name: authenticator-options-flow
flows.description: WebAuthn/passkey authenticator configuration and options.

flows.name: two-factor-backup-codes
flows.description: Two-factor authentication backup code generation and retrieval.

flows.name: session-management
flows.description: Server-side session and CSRF cookie lifecycle management for authentication.

flows.name: account-provider-management
flows.description: Server-side utilities for managing user accounts and OAuth provider associations.

flows.name: session-retrieval
flows.description: Server-side utilities for retrieving user sessions and session state.

flows.name: oauth-flow-handlers
flows.description: Server-side OAuth authorization and callback URL handling utilities.

flows.name: openid-configuration
flows.description: Server-side utility for retrieving OpenID Connect configuration.

features.name: template
features.description: Reusable document templates and embedded signing workflows that allow third-party apps to create and sign documents from templates. (merged: trpc/template, trpc/embedding)

flows.name: search-and-browse-templates
flows.description: User searches, filters, and retrieves templates by ID or criteria.

flows.name: create-document-from-template
flows.description: User creates a new document from an existing template, including direct-link and bulk-send variants.

flows.name: manage-template-direct-link
flows.description: User creates, toggles, or deletes a direct signing link for a template.

flows.name: generate-embedding-presign-token
flows.description: API consumer generates a short-lived presign token to authorize embedded document/template authoring sessions.

flows.name: embed-create-or-update-template
flows.description: Embedded partner creates or updates a signing template within an embedded authoring session.

flows.name: embed-author-template
flows.description: Embedded user uploads a PDF, configures recipients and places fields to create a reusable template.

flows.name: embed-sign-direct-template
flows.description: Recipient signs a document generated from a direct template link via an embedded experience.

flows.name: configure-template-flow
flows.description: User sets up a reusable document template by defining placeholder recipients, fields, and settings.

flows.name: sign-direct-template
flows.description: Recipient opens a direct-link template via token, authenticates if required, and signs the generated document.

flows.name: browse-team-templates
flows.description: User browses and manages reusable document templates within a team or organisation.

flows.name: view-template-details
flows.description: User views template details, previews fields, and initiates sending or direct-link sharing.

flows.name: template-lifecycle-flow
flows.description: Template creation from documents, direct link management, deletion, and retrieval.

flows.name: get-template-flow
flows.description: Retrieve template records by ID for document creation and signing workflows.

flows.name: embedded-signing-flow
flows.description: Third-party embedded document and envelope creation and updates for template-based signing.

flows.name: template-retrieval-api
flows.description: tRPC handler for fetching templates by IDs.

flows.name: list-and-retrieve-documents

flows.name: seed-initial-database
flows.description: Populates the database with example users, admin accounts, documents, and direct templates for development and testing.

flows.name: seed-medium-account
flows.description: Creates a medium-scale test account with 1000 documents across draft, pending, and completed statuses to simulate a realistic user workload.

flows.name: seed-test-user
flows.description: Creates an individual user with a personal organisation and team for use in automated tests.

flows.name: seed-test-documents
flows.description: Seeds draft, pending, and completed documents with recipients for a given user and team in test scenarios.

flows.name: seed-test-templates
flows.description: Seeds blank and direct signing templates owned by a user and team for test scenarios.

flows.name: seed-team-with-members
flows.description: Creates a team with an owner and optional members and team email address for collaborative test scenarios.

flows.name: seed-organisation-members
flows.description: Adds multiple members with specified roles to an existing organisation for permission and access control testing.

flows.name: seed-folder
flows.description: Creates a blank document folder owned by a user and team for folder-management test scenarios.

features.name: openpage-api
features.description: Public API exposing open-source community health metrics and product growth metrics. (merged: openpage-api/community, openpage-api/growth)

flows.name: fetch-github-repository-stats
flows.description: Consumer retrieves GitHub repository metrics (stars, forks, issues, pull requests) from the GitHub API.

flows.name: fetch-community-totals
flows.description: Consumer retrieves aggregated community totals for stars, forks, issues, and PRs.

flows.name: fetch-user-growth-metrics
flows.description: Consumer retrieves monthly and total user growth data including new users, total users, and total customers.

flows.name: fetch-completed-documents-metrics
flows.description: Consumer retrieves monthly and total completed document counts to track document signing activity over time.

flows.name: fetch-signer-conversion-metrics
flows.description: Consumer retrieves monthly and total signer conversion data showing how many document signers subsequently signed up as users.

flows.name: discover-api-endpoints
flows.description: Consumer fetches the root index to discover all available top-level API categories and their paths.

flows.name: openpage-api-metrics-flow
flows.description: Public API endpoint exposing community health and product growth metrics with CORS support.

flows.name: openpage-api-cors-flow
flows.description: CORS preflight handling for public API endpoints.

flows.name: growth-metrics-api-flow
flows.description: Public API endpoint for product growth metrics with CORS support.

flows.name: openpage-cors-preflight
flows.description: CORS preflight OPTIONS handlers for openpage-api community and growth metrics endpoints.

flows.name: growth-metrics-api
flows.description: Public API endpoint for total completed documents growth metric.

bug_fix_prs.title: fix: show current month data and add caching (#2573)
bug_fix_prs.author: Ephraim Duncan

flows.name: sign-pdf-document
flows.description: Cryptographically signs a PDF document using the configured transport (local P12 certificate or Google Cloud HSM) and optionally timestamps it via a TSA authority.

features.name: ee/email-domain-management
features.description: Enterprise email domain provisioning and verification via AWS SES, including DKIM setup, domain registration, re-registration, deletion, and linking to an organisation account.

flows.name: register-email-domain
flows.description: Organisation admin registers a custom email domain via AWS SES with DKIM key pair generation.

flows.name: verify-email-domain
flows.description: Organisation admin syncs and verifies the DKIM status of a pending email domain against AWS SES.

flows.name: delete-email-domain
flows.description: Organisation admin removes a custom email domain from both the database and AWS SES.

flows.name: reregister-email-domain
flows.description: Organisation admin re-registers a stuck or failed email domain in SES using the existing DKIM key pair without requiring DNS record changes.
